song.title: May My Day Be Full of Christ
song.lyrics:
[V1] . C Dm G May my day be full of Christ, . Em F G May my words be spoken in Him. . C Am May my being find rest, . F Fm Lying on His sweet breast. . C G F C May my day be full of Christ.
[V2] May my mind be filled with His light, May my spirit be shining so bright, May his life bear much fruit, May I be absolute, To partake of the living Christ.
